meaning: n.教堂,礼拜堂,教会,教派,[宗]礼拜
examples: She plays the organ in church.
The family had gone to church.
It's not clear whether the results of this test will convince the Orthodox Church.
Here lies Rome's loveliest, yet off-the-beaten-track church, the simple, majestic Santa Sabina (Piazza Pietro d'Illiria 1).
